title: Add SecretHandle interface and span-level secret handling
objective: Replace document-level secret blocking with controlled secret handles while continuing non-secret ingestion.
requirements: Add disabled mode if no provider is configured.
Add external_vault_link MVP mode targeting Vaultwarden-compatible links/handles for human-entered and human-read secret values.
Keep OpenBao as a later provider for service-consumed secrets, dynamic credentials and server-side lookup.
Extract secret spans and replace with <SECRET_HANDLE:...> or redacted placeholder.
Ensure secret values never enter prompts, tool traces, indexes, safe corpus, ChatMessage metadata, AgentActionLog payloads or ordinary logs.
acceptance_checks: Secret-only text creates issue/handle without indexed value.
Secret value is absent from all memory outputs and audit payloads.
